title: limnorchis dilatata subsp. albiflora
intro: Limnorchis dilatata subsp. albiflora, also known as the white-flowered or alpine orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving respiratory function, and reducing symptoms of fever and pain. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Limnorchis dilatata subsp. albiflora involve boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a tea or decoction that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
